title: ipa security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4.12.2-22.0.1.1]
- Set IPAPLATFORM=rhel when build on Oracle Linux [Orabug: 29516674]
- Add bind to ipa-server-common Requires [Orabug: 36518596]

[4.12.2-22.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-118449 ipa: Privilege escalation from host to domain admin in FreeIPA

[4.12.2-22]
- Resolves: RHEL-107483 ipa-ca-install fails on CA-less replica due to inadequate key usage in master certificate
full_text:
[4.12.2-22.0.1.1]
- Set IPAPLATFORM=rhel when build on Oracle Linux [Orabug: 29516674]
- Add bind to ipa-server-common Requires [Orabug: 36518596]

[4.12.2-22.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-118449 ipa: Privilege escalation from host to domain admin in FreeIPA

[4.12.2-22]
- Resolves: RHEL-107483 ipa-ca-install fails on CA-less replica due to inadequate key usage in master certificate

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20928.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-7493.html
